AIDM.Settings.Title: AI Dungeon Master Settings
AIDM.Settings.Menu.Name: AI DM Configuration
AIDM.Settings.Menu.Label: Configure
AIDM.Settings.Menu.Hint: Configure your LLM provider, model selection, and API keys.
AIDM.Settings.Provider.Label: Provider
AIDM.Settings.Model.Label: Model
AIDM.Settings.ApiKey.Label: API Key
AIDM.Notifications.InvalidKey: API key is invalid or missing.
AIDM.WorldGen.Title: Generate Campaign World
AIDM.WorldGen.CampaignName.Label: Campaign Name
AIDM.WorldGen.Theme.Label: Theme & Setting
AIDM.WorldGen.Theme.Placeholder: Dark medieval fantasy, post-apocalyptic magic, pirate seas…
AIDM.WorldGen.Theme.Hint: Be as specific or broad as you like — the AI fills in the gaps.
AIDM.WorldGen.Tone.Label: Tone
AIDM.WorldGen.GameSystem.Label: Game System
AIDM.WorldGen.PlayerCount.Label: Number of Players
AIDM.WorldGen.Notes.Label: Session Zero Notes
AIDM.WorldGen.Notes.Placeholder: Backstory elements, things to avoid, specific requests…
AIDM.WorldGen.Notes.Hint: Optional. Anything the AI should know before generating.
AIDM.WorldGen.Validation.Required: Campaign name and theme are required.
AIDM.WorldGen.Error.NoProvider: No LLM provider configured. Open AI DM Settings first.
AIDM.WorldGen.Error.ParseFailed: The AI response could not be parsed as JSON. Try again.
AIDM.WorldGen.Success: World generated and saved to the AIDM Vault.
AIDM.Panel.Title: AI Dungeon Master
AIDM.Panel.FrameScene: Frame Scene — use input text as scene description
AIDM.Panel.FrameScene.EmptyHint: Describe the scene in the input field first.
AIDM.Panel.TakeNotes: Take Notes — summarise this exchange to the vault
AIDM.Panel.Notes.EmptyHint: Nothing to take notes on yet.
AIDM.Panel.Input.NarrativePlaceholder: Instruct the AI DM or describe a situation… (Enter to send)
AIDM.Panel.Input.NPCPlaceholder: What does the player say to this NPC? (Enter to send)
AIDM.Settings.CombatSystem.Label: Combat System
AIDM.Settings.CombatSystem.Hint: Override auto-detection if you are using a custom system adapter.
AIDM.Settings.AICombatAuto.Name: AI Combat: Auto-run NPC turns
AIDM.Settings.AICombatAuto.Hint: When enabled, the AI automatically executes each non-player combatant's turn. Disable to use the Run AI Turn button in the DM panel instead.
AIDM.Panel.RunAITurn: Run AI Turn — execute the current NPC's turn
AIDM.Combat.NoActiveCombatant: No combatant is currently taking their turn.
AIDM.Combat.PlayerTurn: It is a player character's turn — the AI does not control PCs.
AIDM.SceneGen.Title: Generate Scene
AIDM.SceneGen.Name.Label: Scene Name
AIDM.SceneGen.Description.Label: Description
AIDM.SceneGen.Description.Placeholder: A flooded tomb beneath the city sewers, the air thick with alchemical fumes…
AIDM.SceneGen.Description.Hint: Describe the location — the AI fills in atmosphere, lighting, and layout suggestions.
AIDM.SceneGen.Type.Label: Scene Type
AIDM.SceneGen.Size.Label: Map Size
AIDM.SceneGen.Lighting.Label: Lighting
AIDM.SceneGen.LightCount.Label: Light Sources
AIDM.SceneGen.LightCount.Hint: Number of ambient lights the AI will place on the scene (0–12).
AIDM.SceneGen.Error.NoProvider: No LLM provider configured. Open AI DM Settings first.
AIDM.SceneGen.Error.ParseFailed: Could not parse the AI scene response as JSON. Try again.
AIDM.ActorGen.Title: Generate NPC
AIDM.ActorGen.Concept.Label: NPC Concept
AIDM.ActorGen.Concept.Placeholder: A tiefling warlock enforcer working for the Crimson Hand thieves guild…
AIDM.ActorGen.Concept.Hint: Include personality, role, any specific traits you want. The AI builds the stat block.
AIDM.ActorGen.CR.Label: Challenge Rating
AIDM.ActorGen.Role.Label: Combat Role
AIDM.ActorGen.Role.Hint: Shapes the AI's stat allocation and action choices.
AIDM.ActorGen.SpawnCount.Label: Spawn on Current Scene
AIDM.ActorGen.SpawnCount.Hint: Immediately place this many tokens on the active scene. Set 0 to skip.
AIDM.ActorGen.Success: NPC "{name}" created in the Actors directory.
AIDM.ActorGen.Spawned: {count} token(s) for {name} placed on the active scene.
AIDM.ActorGen.Error.ParseFailed: Could not parse the AI NPC response as JSON. Try again.
AIDM.Error.GMOnly: This action is only available to the Game Master.
AIDM.Settings.GMOversight.Name: AI Combat: GM Oversight Mode
AIDM.Settings.GMOversight.Hint: Show a confirmation dialog before each NPC AI action executes. Approve to proceed or skip to pass the turn. Recommended when first using the AI combat system.
